items.caption: A flowchart outlining the steps of a number guessing game. the flowchart is structured with a decision tree, starting with the initial action of "pick a number." the next decision point asks if the guess is wrong but still has more chances, leading to the option to "get the next guess" or to "update the number of tries." if the guess is wrong and there are no more chances, the flowchart suggests "display the result of the game" and "final adjustments." the flowchart is a visual representation of a game strategy, guiding the player through the process of guessing a number within a limited number of attempts.
